description: Phase 12 seed corpus for health-ai-service RAG. Each article is adapted from public-domain medical sources (WHO, NIH MedlinePlus, CDC, NICE, EFSA, AASM). The kk articles are initial drafts derived from the ru versions and flagged for human review.

pending_translations.description: Kazakh versions of these new topics are deliberately deferred. Each should be translated from the ru article and then put through human review by a native kk speaker before landing in the corpus (medical content — machine translation without review has bitten us on subtle terminology before). Track them here so they don't get lost.
